rationale: Control case (answer key group=control). Dim1: output p=20, control rule p<=30 -> 2. Dim2: control -> null; output correctly lists no mechanism_hypotheses (also consistent with p<40). Dim3: control -> nulls. Dim4: consistency rule satisfied (p=20 <40 with risk_tier='watch', allowed clear/watch -> no cap). Evidence is specific and genuinely supports claims: CL3 cites exact NI vs OCF pairs across FY2016/FY2017/FY2019 (e.g., NetIncomeLoss -99.3M vs OCF +952.6M for 2016-04-03 to 2017-04-01, accession 0001037038-19-000005); CL5 cites NI across FY2014/FY2017/FY2019 to refute smoothing; CL4 combines InventoryNet, GrossProfit, Revenues into margin trend (~54.9% FY2017 -> ~61.6% FY2019); top_signals coherently synthesizes these multi-year points and candidly flags the allowance-series gap (only 2010-2011). This meets the '2 plus coherent multi-year/multi-point combination' bar -> 3. Minor blemishes (CL7 accession 'n/a' for a 2005 NT 10-K from the chronology; fiscal-quarter labeling in CL1) are not fabrications. Memorization condition2: false - reasoning anchors on concrete provided data values throughout, and no post-cutoff revelation/enforcement/outcome facts are cited; the 'store-closure/restructuring' remark is explicitly hedged as uncorroborated interpretation, not a post-cutoff fraud fact.
